calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Instructing Trustee To Place Property In Trust
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Drexler, via ZOOM, for Jackie Jenkins, Petitioner.

The court begins by advising Mr. Drexler that it does not believe that venue is proper. Mr. Drexler offers oral testimony to support his client's petition including that his client still resides in the property located in San Francisco and that his client continually works on administration of the trust from the property. The court advises counsel that it is waiving defects in notice

After additional discussion, the Petition for Order Instructing Trustee to Place Property in Trust is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

Petition For Order Instructing Trustee To Place Property In Trust
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Continued To Jul-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Drexler, via ZOOM, counsel for Jackie Jenkins, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that this may not be the proper venue for this matter as the successor trustee resides in Oakland therefore it appears as though Alameda county would be the proper venue. Counsel submits oral argument in support that San Francisco is the proper venue including that his client lives in the real property located in San Francisco and the trust is mainly administered from the real property. The court then advises counsel that it appears as though service of his second supplement filed with the court is not timely thus this matter will need to be continued. The court turns to the difference in spelling of several of the Beneficiaries' names in the trust instrument and petition and the court instructs counsel to somehow clarify the discrepancy.

The Petition for Order Instructing Trustee to Place Property in Trust is continued to July 26, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
